heading: Acquisition of real and personal property and services
label: 410ffff–3 Acquisition of real and personal property and services
notes: Amendments2021—Subsec. (a). substituted “historical park” for “historic site” in two places.Pub. L. 116–305
amendments: Amendments2021—Subsec. (a). substituted “historical park” for “historic site” in two places.Pub. L. 116–305

children.heading: Real and personal property
children.label: a Real and personal property
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to acquire by donation, exchange, or purchase with donated or appropriated funds, the lands and improvements within the boundaries of the historical park, except that any such lands and improvements owned by the State of Connecticut may be acquired only by donation. The Secretary may also acquire by the same methods personal property associated with, and appropriate for, the interpretation of the historical park: , That the Secretary may acquire works of art associated with the Weir family, J. Alden Weir, and other artists who lived at or visited the site only by donation or purchase with donated funds.Provided

children.heading: Other property, funds, and services
children.label: b Other property, funds, and services
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to accept and use donated funds, property, and services to carry out this subchapter.
